ariaSpec.usage: Indicates the type of navigation provided by the nav element.
The breadcrumb item should render an <a> element or have role="link".
The last breadcrumb item points to the active page.
The last breadcrumb item is disabled.
Delimiter icon should not be accessed through assistive technology.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses next and previous breadcrumb items. The focusable element is the element with either `a` tag, or `role=\"link\"`
Selects the Bredcrumb item, and navigates to it (if navigatable).
